FR-001.title: Writer ships inside the .vsix, copied at build time from the spec-kit ext source (single source of truth)

FR-002.title: Stock preamble references the bundled writer by quoted absolute extension path, never the workspace path

FR-003.title: Self-contradictory stock-mode prose corrected to the new mechanism

FR-004.title: Stock specify captures intent, expectations, context, per-requirement titles

FR-005.title: Stock plan captures approach/decisions/step summary; stock implement journals tasks, checks, coverage tests

FR-006.title: Capture stays best-effort (no python3 = silent skip); companion slim preambles unchanged

FR-007.title: Preamble builders unit-tested: bundled path, quoting, ICE instructions per step

FR-008.title: Sandbox eval: companion-free stock run with forced GUI preamble asserts context outcomes

FR-009.title: capture-and-timing doc stock-mode section + root changelog updated in-change

context: area: src/ai-providers/promptPreamble.ts + promptBuilder.ts (stock vs slim branches) + packaging
constraint: extension-isolation — prompt text built by shipped code is the sanctioned surface; never depend on workspace .specify
constraint: single source of truth speckit-extension/scripts/write-context.py; companion slim preamble byte-identical
intent: Make stock-mode GUI dispatches capture reliably (bundled writer) and richly (ICE/decisions/checks/coverage) so the Activity panel works without the spec-kit extension
expectations: no Activity panel changes — it already renders these fields
companion-mode capture protocol unchanged (command bodies keep owning it)
eval not wired into jest — committed re-runnable script
